name: a-font-face-off
description: Build scripts for A Font Face-off (web-ext)

scripts.build:latest: npm run build && cp web-ext-artifacts/*.zip web-ext-artifacts/latest.xpi
scripts.build:edge-crx: npm run build:edge-mv3 && npm run pack:edge-crx
scripts.pack:edge-smoke-crx: node scripts/pack-edge-crx.js --source-dir ztemp/edge-smoke-mv3-src --key ztemp/edge-smoke-key.pem --zip ztemp/edge-smoke-mv3.zip --out web-ext-artifacts/affo-edge-mv3-smoke.crx
scripts.build:edge-smoke-crx: npm run build:edge-smoke-mv3 && npm run pack:edge-smoke-crx
